spec_updates.highlight: PR #5288: reconfirmation validation changed to check checkpoint is in confirmed block's chain, not just block ancestry
PR #5249: makes FCR compatible with Gloas and future Gloas-based forks; FCR tests passing with this PR

testing_progress.highlight: Plan to disable BLS in FCR tests to speed up test generation; no functional impact expected
After PRs #5249 and #5288 merge, FCR tests will be enabled for Gloas and Haze forks

api_and_metrics.highlight: Beacon API PR #611: FCR event emits only tip of confirmed chain, not every confirmed block
Beacon metrics PR #22: proposes standardized FCR metrics (reorgs, fallbacks, restarts, confirmed slot, duration)

research_and_monitoring.highlight: Public Grafana dashboard live showing FCR performance from a Lighthouse node; ~97% same-slot confirmation rate
EthPandaOps FCR simulator published: no reorged/orphaned slots were fast-confirmed across historical mainnet data

organizational.highlight: Next call in 2 weeks skipped by default (Mikhail on vacation); async updates in Telegram instead; reconvene in 4 weeks

action_items.action: Review beacon-metrics PR #22 and provide feedback on proposed standardized FCR metrics
Implement chain-walking logic in dashboard to correctly display all confirmed blocks between events

decisions.decision: FCR Beacon API event sends only the tip of the confirmed chain, not an event per confirmed block
FCR call in 2 weeks skipped by default; async Telegram updates instead
